Name: MENU_OFFSCR_REND_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the configuration of the camera when viewing menu elements.

Fields.Name: Gaze Point: X
Fields.Description: The camera gaze point's position on the x-axis.

Fields.Name: Gaze Point: Y
Fields.Description: The camera gaze point's position on the y-axis.

Fields.Name: Gaze Point: Z
Fields.Description: The camera gaze point's position on the z-axis.

Fields.Name: Distance
Fields.Description: The distance the camera is from the player entity. In metres.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X
Fields.Description: The camera's rotation on the x-axis.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Y
Fields.Description: The camera's rotation on the y-axis.

Fields.Name: Field of View
Fields.Description: The field of view of the camera.

Fields.Name: Minimum Distance
Fields.Description: The minimum distance for the camera to be placed at. In metres.

Fields.Name: Maximum Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum distance for the camera to be placed at. In metres.

Fields.Name: Minimum Rotation: X
Fields.Description: The minimum angle for the camera's rotation on the x-axis.

Fields.Name: Maximum Rotation: X
Fields.Description: The maximum angle for the camera's rotation on the x-axis.

Fields.Name: GParam ID
Fields.Description: The gparam ID to use for this camera.

Fields.Name: Offset: X
Fields.Description: The offset rate for the camera on the x-axis (0.5 will shift half the screen). In metres.

Fields.Name: Offset: Y
Fields.Description: The offset rate for the camera on the y-axis (0.5 will shift half the screen). In metres.

Fields.Name: Offset: Z
Fields.Description: The offset rate for the camera on the z-axis. In metres.

Fields.Name: Referenced Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: If set to a valid ID, the dummy polygon ID will be used to calculate the gaze point and rotation.

Fields.Name: Set Gaze Point to Booster
Fields.Description: If ON, then the camera's gaze point is fixed to the position of the Booster model.

Fields.Name: Use Hand Height for Gaze Point
Fields.Description: If ON, hand height is used instead of core height for the gaze point.

Fields.Name: Mission Location Icon: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID that is used to place the mission location display icon.

Fields.Name: Reference ID for Bipedal
Fields.Description: The MenuOffscrRendParam row to use if the player is using Bipedal legs.

Fields.Name: Reference ID for Treads
Fields.Description: The MenuOffscrRendParam row to use if the player is using Treads (tank legs).
